raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased XXXX separate items on XXXX from XXXX Shortly after purchasing the items the user closed the XXXX account. To my surprise the wrong speakers showed up XXXX weeks later. 
Being the wrong speakers I disputed the item with Citi and went thru XXXX to send them back. XXXX said the package was undeliverable and returned it to me. ( I have photos. ) I the mean time Citi sided with XXXX saying I never returned the items. 
I contacted Citi bank and they claimed to have reopened the case but will not provide me with any proof. My online account still says that the case is closed.
